description: Stylish and sweet without looking overtly grown-up, this pair is perfect for the teen who likes to stay abreast of the latest fashion trends. This pair is just right for the Sugar Rush look with pastel shades dominating the ensemble!UpperTwo leather straps across the midfootLeather strip acting as a stiff heel collarAnkle band adhered to the heel collar with braid and floral details Has a Velcro closureOutsoleTPU textured outsole with a heel patchSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
